name: when one rule changes, only that rule is re-materialized and the rest are served from cache
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/config-sync.sh" --persist --out view.yaml 2>/dev/null; ruby -ryaml -e 'd=YAML.unsafe_load_file("view.yaml"); k=d["rules"].keys.first; d["rules"][k]["_hash"]="STALE"; File.write("view.yaml", YAML.dump(d))'; bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/config-sync.sh" --persist --out view.yaml 2>e.txt; grep -qE 'unchanged=[0-9]+ updated=1 added=0' e.txt && echo only-changed-updates 1>&2
